evidence_summary: [CH012_SC004] Purpose: To show Carter establishing his new base of operations and managing his resources.

[CH012_SC004] Summary: Carter receives his spoils of war—weapons, silks, furs, and food—delivered by the retinues of the chieftains he defeated. He organizes these people into a functional unit to manage his new quarters, effectively setting up his command...
[CH012_SC004] Emotional arc: From chaos/arrival to organized authority and domestic establishment.

[CH012_SC004] Coverage: * Montage of goods being brought in (silks, weapons, food). * Wide shots of the room filling up. * Medium shots of Carter directing his new subordinates. * Establishing shot of the overgrown central court with fountains/statuary.
[CH012_SC004] Continuity: The accumulation of items in the room; the specific types of goods being moved; the number of people present in the unit.
